description_long: This is a commercial passenger airplane with a streamlined fuselage, painted primarily white with the Lufthansa logo and branding on the side. The aircraft features two large turbofan engines mounted under its low-set, swept-back wings, which are equipped with subtle upward-angled winglets. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all painted blue with the Lufthansa logo on the fin. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with multiple windows visible, and the landing gear is in a tricycle configuration with the main gear under the wings and a nose gear at the front. The airplane's surface appears smooth and metallic, with a glossy finish reflecting light, and the overall design is typical of modern short- to medium-haul commercial jets.
description: A Lufthansa-branded commercial jet with low, swept-back wings, twin underwing turbofan engines, and a blue tail fin featuring the airline's logo. The fuselage is white and streamlined, with a forward cockpit and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose, cockpit windows, and the symmetrical placement of the engines under the wings.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the Lufthansa branding, blue tail fin with logo, and the full length of the fuselage and wings.
description_view_2: Rear oblique view highlighting the tail section, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the engine nacelles under the wings.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with clear visibility of the airline logo, engine, and landing gear details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back configuration with subtle upward-angled winglets and moderate dihedral angle.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with multiple windows
